title: Publication of procedure
doc_html:
NOTE: This provision of law was included in the Unconstitutional Statutes Biennial Report to the Legislature, dated March 14, 2016.

§1173. Publication of procedure

            The administrative remedy procedure shall be published in the Louisiana Register.            Acts 1985, No. 672, §1; Acts 2013, No. 220, §5, eff. June 11, 2013.

§1173.  Publication of procedure
The administrative remedy procedure shall be published in the Louisiana Register.
Acts 1985, No. 672, §1; Acts 2013, No. 220, §5, eff. June 11, 2013.
